name: Owner/Operator and Certification Entry
description:
The Pelican Chemical Services facility (Baton Rouge, LA) is preparing its annual EPCRA Tier II report. The chemical inventory data has been entered, but the Owner/Operator and Certification sections are blank and must be completed before submission. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application, open the pre-loaded facility data file located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\pelican_br_distcenter.t2s. 

Navigate to the Owner/Operator section and add TWO distinct entities:
1. Owner Entity: Type: Owner | Company Name: Gulf Coast Chemical Holdings LLC | Mailing Address: 8500 River Road, Baton Rouge, LA 70820 | Phone: (225) 387-0142 | Dun & Bradstreet Number: 07-843-6291
2. Operator Entity: Type: Operator | Company Name: Pelican Chemical Services Inc. | Mailing Address: 8500 River Road, Suite 200, Baton Rouge, LA 70820 | Phone: (225) 387-0198 | Dun & Bradstreet Number: 08-152-7340

Next, navigate to the Certification section and enter the certifier details:
- Full Name: Marcus D. Thibodaux
- Title: Environmental Health and Safety Manager
- Date: 03/01/2025

Once all information is entered, save the report and export/save the completed file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\pelican_br_distcenter.t2s.
